case_title: PAYNE, JAMES F vs. ACEITUNO, EDUARDO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACEITUNO, EDUARDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1600 6TH ST. S.F. CA $1,093.00 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,173.00, LEASE FORFEITED
